LAW AND MOTION 302, CROSS DEFENDANTS HUMBERTO NAVARRO AND WILLIAM JOHNSTON'S DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT IS CONTINUED TO AUGUST 7, 2020 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT 302. JUDGE: RICHARD ULMER, CLERK: S. LE, COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR#8600, MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM, REPORTED. =(302/RBU)

LAW AND MOTION 302,CROSS DEFENDANT HUMBERTO NAVARRO, WILLIAM JOHNSTON'S DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT. HUMBERTO NAVARRO AND WILLIAM JOHNSTON'S "DEMURRER TO CROSS-COMPLAINT" IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH CCP SEC 430.41. COUNSEL'S DECLARATION SAYS HE "ATTEMPTED TO MEET AND CONFER" WITH OPPOSING COUNSEL BY EXCHANGING E-MAILS. BUT SEC 430.41 REQUIRES LAWYERS TO MEET AND CONFER "IN PERSON OR BY TELEPHONE." COUNSEL'S DECLARATION ALSO SAYS OPPOSING COUNSEL DID NOT RESPOND TO HIS ATTEMPTS AT CONTACT. COUNSEL FOR BOTH SIDES ARE THUS ORDERED TO OBEY THE LAW BY IMMEDIATELY MEETING AND CONFERRING AS REQUIRED. HUMBERTO NAVARRO AND WILLIAM JOHNSTON'S RESPONSE TO THE CROSS-COMPLAINT IS NOW DUE ON OR BEFORE SEPTEMBER 4, 2020. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR., CLERK: M. GOODMAN, COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR#8600, MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM, REPORTED. =(302/RBU)

DEMURRER to CROSS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-07-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

CROSS DEFENDANT HUMBERTO NAVARRO, WILLIAM JOHNSTON's DEMURRER to CROSS COMPLAINT.

Humberto Navarro and William Johnston's "demurrer to cross-complaint" is ordered off calendar for failure to comply with CCP Sec 430.41. Counsel's declaration says he "attempted to meet and confer" with opposing counsel by exchanging e-mails. But Sec 430.41 requires lawyers to meet and confer "in person or by telephone." Counsel's declaration also says opposing counsel did not respond to his attempts at contact. Counsel for both sides are thus ordered to obey the law by immediately meeting and conferring as required. Humberto Navarro and William Johnston's response to the cross-complaint is now due on or before September 4, 2020.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)

Off Calendar Jan-24-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Justin Goodman, 415.956.8100 for Defendant Sf Mission Properties, LLC.
Raquel Fox, 415.771.9850 x 1115 for Plaintiff Maria Carvajal. Plaintiff is assisted by Court Spanish Interpreter Luis Gonzalez.
Reported: Vicky Gross CSR #5525, vgross@SFTC.org.

Argued. The Court rules as follows: CROSS DEFENDANT MARIA CARVAJAL DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED without leave to amend. Cross-Complainant failed to sufficiently allege that there is an actual controversy as a predicate to obtaining declaratory relief.
Order signed in Open Court. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Reported: Vicky Gross CSR #5525, vgross@SFTC.org. Order signed in Open Court. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; (501)
